title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART D-2. QUALITY PARENTING FOR CHILDREN IN FOSTER CARE

§286.21. Short title

            This Subpart may be cited as the "Quality Parenting for Children in Foster Care Act".

            Acts 2015, No. 310, §1.
